tasks.title: LLM Router — Configuration System Deep Dive & Schema Validation
tasks.details: Deepen the configuration system with strict schema validation, default value handling, environment variable overrides, and comprehensive error reporting.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for parsing, validation, defaulting, and error messages. Golden-file tests for config examples.

subtasks.title: Define complete RouterConfig struct with all nested sections
subtasks.details: Complexity weights, schedule windows, load thresholds, health rules, fallback chains, override tiers, metrics settings.

subtasks.title: Implement TOML + JSON parsing with serde and custom deserializers
subtasks.details: Support both formats with consistent error messages.

subtasks.title: Add field-level and cross-field validation rules
subtasks.details: Range checks, dependency validation (e.g., fallback backend must exist), mutual exclusion rules.

subtasks.title: Implement default value system with documentation
subtasks.details: Every field has a sensible default and inline docs.

subtasks.title: Support environment variable overrides
subtasks.details: LLM_ROUTER_* prefix with automatic type coercion.

subtasks.title: Create comprehensive router.toml example with comments
subtasks.details: Production-ready example covering all features.

subtasks.title: Build hot-reload with atomic swap and validation
subtasks.details: Zero-downtime reload with rollback on invalid config.

subtasks.title: Write unit, integration, and golden-file config tests
subtasks.details: Full coverage of parsing, validation, and reload behavior.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Cross-Module Integration & Dependency Resolution
tasks.details: Ensure all router subsystems are correctly wired together with proper dependency injection and no circular dependencies.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests that exercise the full decision pipeline. Dependency graph validation.

subtasks.title: Define stable public API surface for all router modules
subtasks.details: Clear traits and structs for telemetry, health, config, etc.

subtasks.title: Implement dependency injection for RoutingContext construction
subtasks.details: All data sources (prompt, time, telemetry, health, overrides, config) are injected cleanly.

subtasks.title: Resolve and document all inter-module dependencies
subtasks.details: Create a dependency matrix and ensure no hidden coupling.

subtasks.title: Add integration test harness with mock stores
subtasks.details: MockTelemetryStore, MockHealthStore, MockOverrideStore, etc.

subtasks.title: Verify deterministic behavior across all module combinations
subtasks.details: Same inputs always produce same BackendSelection.

subtasks.title: Implement graceful degradation when optional modules are missing
subtasks.details: Router still functions if telemetry or health is unavailable.

subtasks.title: Write end-to-end integration tests for the full pipeline
subtasks.details: Cover normal, override, fallback, schedule, and degraded scenarios.

subtasks.title: Document integration points and extension hooks
subtasks.details: How external code can observe or influence routing.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Debug, Inspection & Explainability Layer
tasks.details: Build a comprehensive debug and explainability system that allows developers and operators to understand exactly why a particular backend was chosen.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for explain output determinism. Integration tests with live router. Golden-file tests for visualization output.

subtasks.title: Define DecisionTree, ExplainStep, and VizJSON data structures
subtasks.details: Serializable types capturing full routing trace.

subtasks.title: Implement explain-mode narrative generator
subtasks.details: Human-readable step-by-step reasoning for every decision.

subtasks.title: Build machine-readable visualization JSON emitter
subtasks.details: Complete decision tree in stable JSON format for tools.

subtasks.title: Add router_debug CLI command and API endpoint
subtasks.details: Accept prompt/context and return explain + JSON.

subtasks.title: Implement snapshot capture and replay functionality
subtasks.details: Save and reload full RoutingContext + BackendSelection.

subtasks.title: Create lightweight TUI / interactive inspector
subtasks.details: Live view of router state, health, and recent decisions.

subtasks.title: Ensure production safety (redaction, zero side effects)
subtasks.details: Sensitive data redacted; debug mode never changes routing behavior.

subtasks.title: Write unit, integration, and golden-file debug tests
subtasks.details: Full coverage of explain output and visualization stability.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Documentation, Examples & Developer Onboarding
tasks.details: Produce high-quality, comprehensive documentation for the entire LLM Router subsystem.
tasks.testStrategy: Documentation linting, link checking, example validation, and consistency reviews.

subtasks.title: Write high-level architecture overview
subtasks.details: Purpose, CPU integration, RoutingContext, BackendSelection, subsystem interactions.

subtasks.title: Document each subsystem in detail
subtasks.details: Complexity, schedule, telemetry, health, config, overrides, fallback, API, debug tools.

subtasks.title: Create data-flow and decision-flow diagrams (ASCII + Mermaid)
subtasks.details: Visual representation of the full routing pipeline.

subtasks.title: Write 'How to Add a New Backend' guide
subtasks.details: Enum extension, capability flags, health probes, config integration.

subtasks.title: Write 'How to Tune Router Behavior' guide
subtasks.details: Weights, thresholds, schedule profiles, and performance tuning.

subtasks.title: Write 'How to Debug Routing Decisions' guide
subtasks.details: router_debug usage, snapshot replay, log analysis, explain mode.

subtasks.title: Add concrete RoutingContext / BackendSelection examples
subtasks.details: Realistic inputs and expected outputs for major scenarios.

subtasks.title: Establish documentation linting and validation pipeline
subtasks.details: Link checks, example compilation, consistency tests in CI.

tasks.title: LLM Router — Final Integration, Testing & Epic Completion
tasks.details: Complete the final integration of the LLM Router into the CPU pipeline, run the full test suite, verify all performance budgets, clear all TODOs, and mark the epic as production-ready.
tasks.testStrategy: Full regression suite, performance benchmarks, chaos tests, and production-readiness checklist.

subtasks.title: Wire final integration points into CPU pipeline
subtasks.details: Ensure decide_backend_with_full_context is called at the correct stage.

subtasks.title: Run complete unit + integration test suite
subtasks.details: All tests pass with no flakiness.

subtasks.title: Execute full golden-file regression suite
subtasks.details: All routing decisions match expected baselines.

subtasks.title: Validate performance budgets (P99 < 2ms, low allocations)
subtasks.details: Micro-benchmarks and load tests confirm targets.

subtasks.title: Run chaos and failure-mode test suite
subtasks.details: Router remains stable and deterministic under extreme conditions.

subtasks.title: Clear all TODOs, warnings, and incomplete items
subtasks.details: Zero remaining technical debt in router code.

subtasks.title: Finalize production-readiness checklist
subtasks.details: Logs, config, determinism, safety, documentation, monitoring all verified.

subtasks.title: Mark LLM Router epic complete and update project status
subtasks.details: Update roadmap, changelog, and notify stakeholders.
